message:
chore: remove root-level API skeleton after migration to docs/design/

The v4 API skeleton (asupersync_v4_api_skeleton.rs) was previously
relocated to docs/design/api_skeleton_v4.rs as a historical design
reference, but the original file in the project root was never deleted.
The new scan_stubs.sh check (ZR-SCAN-API-SKELETON-ROOT) enforces this—
the skeleton belongs in docs/design/ outside the compiled source tree,
not at the crate root where it could confuse tooling or new contributors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
